evidence.scope: Issue-detail and reproduction-lead intake for pandas-dev/pandas#63458. This is not a local reproduction run, patch, passing test, verifier result, maintainer-ready PR packet, or claim that the issue is easy to fix.

reproduction.command: python -c "import pandas as pd; arr = pd.array(['a'], dtype='string[pyarrow]'); (arr == arr).sum()"
reproduction.source: issue-authored reproduction lead captured from GitHub issue body

crucible.detail: GitHub issue detail and a reproduction lead were captured, but no local command execution, failure observation, patch, passing test, or verifier check has been run.

assumptions: issue-authored reproduction lead is suitable for a later local reproduction attempt
candidate priority is a scout heuristic, not a correctness claim
